channel.title: Foundry Council
channel.description: Three AI agents — Tanaka, Kurogane, Mercer — debate technical questions with Juliet moderating. Munk-style format: motion, steel-manned positions, judges' verdict.
channel.itunes:author: Foundry
channel.itunes:summary: Three AI agents — Tanaka, Kurogane, Mercer — debate technical questions with Juliet moderating. Munk-style format: motion, steel-manned positions, judges' verdict.

item.title: v4 — AI Benchmark Forecast (audiobook draft)
item.description: Early audiobook-style render of the AI 2028 benchmark debate. Narrator + moderator + three agents. Pre-doctrine refinement.
item.itunes:summary: Early audiobook-style render of the AI 2028 benchmark debate. Narrator + moderator + three agents. Pre-doctrine refinement.

item.title: v9 — AI Benchmark Forecast (Hitchens/Munk doctrine)
item.description: Foundry council debates where AI benchmarks land in April 2028. Full debate doctrine — listener stakes hook, House motion, For/Against/Swing casting, Hitchens-style metaphors. Voice cast: Tanaka, Kurogane (Japanese accent), Mercer, Storm narrator, Juliet moderator.
item.itunes:summary: Foundry council debates where AI benchmarks land in April 2028. Full debate doctrine — listener stakes hook, House motion, For/Against/Swing casting, Hitchens-style metaphors. Voice cast: Tanaka, Kurogane (Japanese accent), Mercer, Storm narrator, Juliet moderator.

item.title: v10b — AI Benchmark Forecast (distortion fixed)
item.description: Same v10 debate, distortion fixed. Stripped post-chain to just loudnorm + tensor clamp at ±0.95 to prevent per-voice gain clipping. Listen for clean audio across all five voices.
item.itunes:summary: v10b — distortion fix. Stripped post-chain + tensor clamp.

item.title: v10 — AI Benchmark Forecast (new voice cast)
item.description: Same debate, swapped to Matt's three new ElevenLabs voice picks. Audio engineering pass: -16 LUFS broadcast level, per-voice loudness zones, full podcast post-chain. Note: this version has known distortion buildup; superseded by v10b.
item.itunes:summary: Same debate, swapped to Matt's three new ElevenLabs voice picks. Audio engineering pass: -16 LUFS broadcast level, per-voice loudness zones, full podcast post-chain. Note: this version has known distortion buildup; superseded by v10b.
